creator: remko@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

As much as I regret that you cannot install FreeBSD, there is not merely 
enough information in your ticket. You can try the bootonly CD's, 
various releases and things like that to see whether it's a FreeBSD <> 
Machine interaction or something else. Please ask around on 
questions@FreeBSD.org to get more information about possible solutions, 
if that all does not work, please get back to me so that we can file a 
proper ticket that actually makes a chance on being resolved.
